market_pulse.one_liner: Low VIX and heavy SPY call buying suggest bullish momentum despite mixed headlines.
market_pulse.sector_rotation: Rotating into defensive sectors (healthcare, energy, gold, yen) even amid risk-on signals, indicating cautious positioning.

held_position_review.rationale: New sector rotation entry; energy benefits from geopolitical tensions, hold for trend.
Defensive healthcare holding, initiated today; hold as market hedges.
Yen exposure for risk-off diversification; hold as geopolitical hedge.
Gold as safe haven; geopolitical uncertainty supports price, hold.

opportunities.thesis: Overbought RSI 76.3 on screener, near high, likely mean reversion.
Slow, steady with room for multiple expansion per Seeking Alpha upgrade, value play.
opportunities.catalyst: Analyst upgrade, rotation into value stocks.

risk_alerts.alert: Escalating Ukraine rhetoric may spike energy prices and safe-haven demand, boosting XLE/GLD but increasing overall volatility.
Overbought Canadian banks could see quick pullbacks; avoid long entries in that space.

geopolitical_impact.headline: Putin says there is 'no point' meeting Zelensky over ending Ukraine war
geopolitical_impact.rationale: Prolongs conflict, supporting energy prices (XLE) and safe havens (GLD, FXY).

geopolitical_impact.headline: Ukraine strikes cargo ships and admits Romania drone blast
geopolitical_impact.rationale: Escalation risks disrupt commodity supply chains, boosting energy and gold.

geopolitical_impact.headline: Astronauts return to ISS after sheltering during air leak repair attempt
Fury in France after child murder suspect's criminal record released
geopolitical_impact.rationale: Domestic legal issue, no market consequences.

geopolitical_impact.headline: Nearly 50 people die of thirst in Sahara desert after lorry breaks down
Iran footballers issued US visas for World Cup, says White House
geopolitical_impact.rationale: Minor diplomatic gesture, negligible market effect.

geopolitical_impact.headline: Zelenskyy: Putin choosing war by rejecting offer for in-person talks
geopolitical_impact.rationale: Confirms diplomatic deadlock, reinforcing safe-haven asset demand.

geopolitical_impact.headline: Trump hails jobs surge, says Iran talks ‘going well’
geopolitical_impact.rationale: Positive sentiment but non-specific; minor risk-on tailwind.

immediate: Hold all positions; no changes required on day 0 of sector rotation.
